heading: Establishment of clearinghouse and advisory council
label: 2012 Establishment of clearinghouse and advisory council

children.heading: Clearinghouse
children.label: a Clearinghouse
children.text: There is established, under the supervision of the Attorney General of the United States, an information clearinghouse to be known as the National Methamphetamine Information Clearinghouse.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established an advisory council to be known as the National Methamphetamine Advisory Council.

children.label: A
children.text: not fewer than 3 of whom shall be representatives of law enforcement agencies;

children.label: B
children.text: not fewer than 4 of whom shall be representatives of nongovernmental and nonprofit organizations providing services or training and implementing programs or strategies related to methamphetamines; and

children.label: C
children.text: 1 of whom shall be a representative of the Department of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: Period of appointment; vacancies
children.label: 3 Period of appointment; vacancies
children.text: Members shall be appointed for 3 years. Any vacancy in the Council shall not affect its powers, but shall be filled in the same manner as the original appointment.

children.heading: Travel expenses
children.label: A Travel expenses
children.text: The members of the Council shall be allowed travel expenses, including per diem in lieu of subsistence, at rates authorized for employees of agencies under subchapter I of chapter 57 of title 5, while away from their homes or regular places of business in the performance of services for the Council.

children.heading: No compensation
children.label: B No compensation
children.text: The members of the Council shall not receive compensation for the performance of the duties of a member of the Council.
